solve(Grid, K) ->
    M = length(Grid),
    N = length(hd(Grid)),
    Dirs = [{0, 1}, {1, 0}],
    Visited = [[[infinity || _ <- lists:seq(0, K)] || _ <- lists:seq(1, N)] || _ <- lists:seq(1, M)],
    InitialVisited = setVisited(Visited, 1, 1, K + 1, 0),
    PriorityQueue = pq:new(fun({Cost, _, _, _}) -> Cost end),
    UpdatedQueue = pq:in({0, 1, 1, K}, PriorityQueue),
    solveLoop(Grid, M, N, Dirs, InitialVisited, UpdatedQueue).

solveLoop(Grid, M, N, Dirs, Visited, Queue) ->
    case pq:is_empty(Queue) of
        true -> -1;
        false ->
            {{Cost, I, J, KLeft}, NewQueue} = pq:out(Queue),
            if
                I =:= M, J =:= N -> Cost;
                true ->
                    CurrentVisited = getVisited(Visited, I, J, KLeft + 1),
                    if
                        Cost > CurrentVisited ->
                            solveLoop(Grid, M, N, Dirs, Visited, NewQueue);
                        true ->
                            NewVisited1 = processNormalMoves(Grid, M, N, Dirs, I, J, KLeft, Cost, Visited, NewQueue),
                            NewVisited2 = processTeleportMoves(Grid, M, N, I, J, KLeft, Cost, NewVisited1, NewQueue),
                            solveLoop(Grid, M, N, Dirs, NewVisited2, NewQueue)
                    end
            end
    end.

processNormalMoves(Grid, M, N, Dirs, I, J, KLeft, Cost, Visited, Queue) ->
    lists:foldl(fun({Di, Dj}, {VisitedAcc, QueueAcc}) ->
        NI = I + Di,
        NJ = J + Dj,
        if
            NI =< M, NJ ==< N ->
                NewCost = Cost + getGridValue(Grid, NI, NJ),
                CurrentVisited = getVisited(VisitedAcc, NI, NJ, KLeft + 1),
                if
                    NewCost < CurrentVisited ->
                        NewVisited = setVisited(VisitedAcc, NI, NJ, KLeft + 1, NewCost),
                        NewQueue = pq:in({NewCost, NI, NJ, KLeft}, QueueAcc),
                        {NewVisited, NewQueue};
                    true ->
                        {VisitedAcc, QueueAcc}
                end;
            true ->
                {VisitedAcc, QueueAcc}
        end
    end, {Visited, Queue}, Dirs).

processTeleportMoves(Grid, M, N, I, J, KLeft, Cost, Visited, Queue) ->
    if
        KLeft > 0 ->
            lists:foldl(fun(X, VisitedAcc) ->
                lists:foldl(fun(Y, VisitedAcc2) ->
                    if
                        getGridValue(Grid, X, Y) =< getGridValue(Grid, I, J), (X =/= I orelse Y =/= J) ->
                            NewKLeft = KLeft - 1,
                            CurrentVisited = getVisited(VisitedAcc2, X, Y, NewKLeft + 1),
                            if
                                Cost < CurrentVisited ->
                                    setVisited(VisitedAcc2, X, Y, NewKLeft + 1, Cost);
                                true ->
                                    VisitedAcc2
                            end;
                        true ->
                            VisitedAcc2
                    end
                end, VisitedAcc, lists:seq(1, N))
            end, Visited, lists:seq(1, M));
        true ->
            Visited
    end.

getGridValue(Grid, I, J) ->
    lists:nth(J, lists:nth(I, Grid)).

getVisited(Visited, I, J, K) ->
    lists:nth(K, lists:nth(J, lists:nth(I, Visited))).

setVisited(Visited, I, J, K, Value) ->
    Row = lists:nth(I, Visited),
    Col = lists:nth(J, Row),
    NewCol = setnth(K, Col, Value),
    NewRow = setnth(J, Row, NewCol),
    setnth(I, Visited, NewRow).

setnth(1, [_|T], X) -> [X|T];
setnth(N, [H|T], X) -> [H|setnth(N-1, T, X)].

% Priority Queue implementation
pq:new(PriorityFun) -> {PriorityFun, []}.
pq:in(Item, {PriorityFun, Queue}) -> {PriorityFun, insert(Item, Queue, PriorityFun)}.
pq:out({PriorityFun, [H|T]}) -> {H, {PriorityFun, T}};
pq:out({_, []}) -> error.
pq:is_empty({_, []}) -> true;
pq:is_empty(_) -> false.

insert(Item, [], PriorityFun) -> [Item];
insert(Item, [H|T], PriorityFun) ->
    case PriorityFun(Item) =< PriorityFun(H) of
        true -> [Item, H|T];
        false -> [H|insert(Item, T, PriorityFun)]
    end.

solve(Grid, K) ->
    M = length(Grid),
    N = length(hd(Grid)),
    Dirs = [{0, 1}, {1, 0}],

    PriorityQueue = pq:new(fun({_, _, Cost, _}) -> Cost end),
    PriorityQueue1 = pq:push({0, 0, 0, K}, PriorityQueue),

search(Grid, M, N, Dirs, Queue, Visited) ->
    case pq:is_empty(Queue) of
        true -> -1;
        false ->
            {{I, J, Cost, KLeft}, Queue1} = pq:pop(Queue),
            if
                I =:= M - 1, J =:= N - 1 -> Cost;
                true ->
                    case getVisited(I, J, KLeft, Visited) of
                        V when V < Cost -> search(Grid, M, N, Dirs, Queue1, Visited);

                                fun({Di, Dj}, Q) ->
                                    NI = I + Di,
                                    NJ = J + Dj,

                                                    NewVisited = setVisited(NI, NJ, KLeft, NewCost, Visited),

                                                _ -> Q
                                            end;

                                    end

                            % Teleport moves

                                                    case (lists:nth(Y + 1, lists:nth(X + 1, Grid)) =< lists:nth(J + 1, lists:nth(I + 1, Grid))) andalso (X =/= I orelse Y =/= J) of

                                                                V when Cost < V ->
                                                                    NewVisited1 = setVisited(X, Y, NewKLeft, Cost, Visited),
                                                                    pq:push({X, Y, Cost, NewKLeft}, QAcc1, NewVisited1);
                                                                _ -> QAcc1
                                                            end;
                                                        false -> QAcc1
                                                    end
                                                end,
                                                QAcc,
                                                lists:seq(0, N - 1)
                                            )
                                        end,

                                        lists:seq(0, M - 1)
                                    ),

                            end
                    end
            end
    end.

getVisited(I, J, KLeft, Visited) ->
    lists:nth(KLeft + 1, lists:nth(J + 1, lists:nth(I + 1, Visited))).

setVisited(I, J, KLeft, Value, Visited) ->
    Row = lists:nth(I + 1, Visited),
    Col = lists:nth(J + 1, Row),
    NewCol = setnth(KLeft + 1, Col, Value),
    NewRow = setnth(J + 1, Row, NewCol),
    setnth(I + 1, Visited, NewRow).

setnth(1, [_|T], X) -> [X|T];
setnth(N, [H|T], X) -> [H|setnth(N-1, T, X)].

insert(Item, Priority, [H|T]) ->
    [H|insert(Item, Priority, T)].

    {Item, {PriorityFun, T}}.
